prompt: I need a new section for my w-b.dev page that compares our old alert triage approach to the new one. Build a split-panel comparison component showing 'Before' on the left (old, dimmed) and 'After' on the right (accent-bordered). Include 4 bullet points on each side using the monospace style.

assertions.description: accent-dim or --accent used for new panel border
Bullet points use monospace (JetBrains Mono / var(--mono))
No hardcoded hex colors outside of :root token definitions
Dark background (#0e0e0e) used, not light theme
Panel labels use uppercase monospace style
